##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/common/bank/query 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/common/bank/query 
 ## 接口描述 
查询开户行信息，可以通过银行名称模糊搜索 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","label":"%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E9%9D%A2","desc":"%20%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E9%9D%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%BA0","required":true,"exampleValue":"0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","label":"%E5%8D%95%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%BA1%0A%E5%8D%95%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A5000","required":true,"exampleValue":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"branchBankName","label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E6%94%AF%E8%A1%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%EF%BC%88%E6%A8%A1%E7%B3%8A%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"%E6%9D%AD%E5%B7%9E%E6%94%AF%E8%A1%8C"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"total","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"2","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"list","required":false,"label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"bankCitySeqId","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"82310833","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"branchBankNum","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%86%E8%A1%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"001100011002","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"branchBankName","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%86%E8%A1%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E4%BA%BA%E6%B0%91%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%90%A5%E4%B8%9A%E7%AE%A1%E7%90%86%E9%83%A8%E8%90%A5%E4%B8%9A%E5%AE%A4","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"bankNum","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%A7%E8%A1%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"001","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"bankName","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E4%BA%BA%E6%B0%91%E4%BA%BA%E8%A1%8C","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"cityFourCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%9B%9B%E4%BD%8D%E5%9C%B0%E5%8C%BA%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"1000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"provinceSixCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AD%E4%BD%8D%E7%9C%81%E4%BB%BD%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"110000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"provinceName","required":false,"label":"%E7%9C%81%E4%BB%BD%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%8C%97%E4%BA%AC%E5%B8%82","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"cityName","required":false,"label":"%E5%B8%82%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%8C%97%E4%BA%AC%E5%B8%82","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"citySixCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AD%E4%BD%8D%E5%B8%82%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"110000","desc":""}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
	"start":0,
	"limit":100,
	"branchBankName":"中国人民银行营业管理部营业室"
}
```
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "data": {
        "total": "2",
        "list": [
            {
                "bankCitySeqId": "82310833",
                "branchBankNum": "001100011002",
                "branchBankName": "中国人民银行营业管理部营业室",
                "bankNum": "001",
                "bankName": "中国人民人行",
                "cityFourCode": "1000",
                "provinceSixCode": "110000",
                "provinceName": "北京市",
                "cityName": "北京市",
                "citySixCode": "110000"
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": "true",
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | Data | Data |

接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/common/bank/query

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/common/bank/query

接口描述

查询开户行信息，可以通过银行名称模糊搜索

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","label":"%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E9%9D%A2","desc":"%20%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E9%9D%A2%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%BA0","required":true,"exampleValue":"0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","label":"%E5%8D%95%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6","desc":"%20%E5%8D%95%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%BA1%0A%E5%8D%95%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0%E9%87%8F%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A5000","required":true,"exampleValue":"10"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"branchBankName","label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E6%94%AF%E8%A1%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%EF%BC%88%E6%A8%A1%E7%B3%8A%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"%E6%9D%AD%E5%B7%9E%E6%94%AF%E8%A1%8C"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","maxLength":"8","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%95%B0%E6%8D%AE","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"total","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E6%80%BB%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"2","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"list","required":false,"label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"bankCitySeqId","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"82310833","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"branchBankNum","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%86%E8%A1%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"001100011002","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"branchBankName","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%86%E8%A1%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E4%BA%BA%E6%B0%91%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%90%A5%E4%B8%9A%E7%AE%A1%E7%90%86%E9%83%A8%E8%90%A5%E4%B8%9A%E5%AE%A4","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"bankNum","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%A7%E8%A1%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"001","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"bankName","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%A7%E8%A1%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E4%BA%BA%E6%B0%91%E4%BA%BA%E8%A1%8C","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"cityFourCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%9B%9B%E4%BD%8D%E5%9C%B0%E5%8C%BA%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"1000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"provinceSixCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AD%E4%BD%8D%E7%9C%81%E4%BB%BD%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"110000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"provinceName","required":false,"label":"%E7%9C%81%E4%BB%BD%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%8C%97%E4%BA%AC%E5%B8%82","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"cityName","required":false,"label":"%E5%B8%82%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%8C%97%E4%BA%AC%E5%B8%82","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"citySixCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AD%E4%BD%8D%E5%B8%82%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"110000","desc":""}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]}
